[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100111111 8
1 0010010110 4
2 0100100000 2
3 1001100111 6
4 1000010000 2
5 1111010011 7
6 0011110110 6
7 1100001010 4

56 65 1101100111 7

70 07 1111010011 7 match 5
